parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor ": 图书管理员" as Admin
participant ": 读者" as Reader
participant ": 图书目录" as Catalog
participant ": 图书信息" as BookInfo
participant ": 借书记录" as Record

activate Admin
Admin -> Reader : 验证读者信息
activate Reader
deactivate Reader

Admin -> Reader : 获取读者借书数量
activate Reader

opt [超出借书数量]
    Reader --> Admin : 借书失败
    deactivate Reader

    Admin -> Catalog : 获取图书目录
    activate Catalog
    Catalog -> BookInfo : 查询图书信息
    activate BookInfo
    BookInfo --> Admin : 返回信息
    deactivate BookInfo
    deactivate Catalog

    Admin -> Record : 存储借书记录
    activate Record
    deactivate Record

    Admin -> Catalog : 借出图书
    activate Catalog
    Catalog -> BookInfo : 减少图书数量
    activate BookInfo
    deactivate BookInfo
    deactivate Catalog

    Admin -> Reader : 减少读者可借数量
    activate Reader
    deactivate Reader
end

deactivate Admin
@enduml
```
